objectives.label: Use wait time at least 3 times

noah_g5_fractions.target_label: Elicit and extend Noah's idea of 'main idea'
noah_g5_fractions.opening_line: The main idea is the first sentence, because it comes first.
noah_g5_fractions.win_line: Oh, the first sentence is just a detail. The main idea is what all the sentences are about together.

jordan_skeptic.opening_line: Why does it matter what the 'main idea' is? I just read it.
jordan_skeptic.win_line: Okay, finding the main idea is like the headline, it tells you the point fast.

diego_ell.opening_line: I know the words... but 'main idea', the big one? I am not sure how to say.
diego_ell.win_line: So the main idea is the whole thing together, not one line. The passage is mostly about bees helping plants.

sam_withdrawn.opening_line: (looks down) I don't want to guess wrong.
sam_withdrawn.win_line: Maybe... it's mostly about how bees help flowers grow?

priya_quiet.opening_line: (has a strong summary ready but waits to be asked)
priya_quiet.win_line: The main idea is that bees and flowers help each other survive.

talia_dominator.opening_line: I know it! It's about bees! It's bees! Call on me!
talia_dominator.win_line: Right, and I'll let someone else add why that's the main idea.
